/usr/bin/ar qc libclipdeck_core.a CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/commands/commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/listener/daemon_listener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/listener/keybind.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/listener/keybind_capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/listener/terminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/recorder/clip_muxer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/recorder/encoded_ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/recorder/gstreamer_recorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/recorder/recorder_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/recorder/recorder_setup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/settings/settings_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/utils/command_runner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/utils/file_descriptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/utils/number_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/utils/process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/utils/runtime_paths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/clipdeck_core.dir/src/utils/string_utils.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libclipdeck_core.a
